R0211.title: Smart Home Privacy Eavesdropping
R0211.definition: Smart speakers, cameras and other home devices are remotely controlled by attackers to eavesdrop on user voice, video and other private information.

references.title: 数据泄露已成现实-智能家居隐私风险

R0211.description: Smart speakers, cameras and other home devices are remotely controlled by attackers to eavesdrop on user voice, video and other private information.
R0211.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
